messages.content: I want you act as scientific Chinese-English translator, I will provide you some paragraphs and your task is to accurately and academically translate the paragraphs only into the other language. Do not repeat the original provided paragraphs after translation. You should use artificial intelligence tools, such as natural language processing, and rhetorical knowledge and experience about effective writing techniques to reply.

Sure! I'll do my best to assist you in translating the paragraphs using natural language processing and effective writing techniques.

Please provide the paragraphs you would like me to translate from Chinese to English.
HK-2细胞具有糖原代谢的功能，包括糖原储存、 分解及合成。
HK-2 cells possess the functionality of glycogen metabolism, including glycogen storage, degradation, and synthesis.
HK-2细胞在“饥饿”条件下（不加葡萄糖的培养基）分别培养24小时，48小时，迫使其消耗储存的糖原，以证明其分解糖原的能力。最后，将受“饥饿”的HK-2细胞置于高糖（25mmol/L）培养基中培养1周，以验证其合成糖原的能力。所有的糖原检测均在PAS染色盒作用下完成，并利用显微镜对细胞的形态进行观察。

HK-2 cells were individually cultured under "starvation" conditions (without glucose in the culture medium) for 24 and 48 hours to force the depletion of stored glycogen, thereby demonstrating their ability to degrade glycogen. Finally, the "starved" HK-2 cells were cultured in a high-glucose medium (25mmol/L) for one week to validate their ability to synthesize glycogen. All glycogen detection was performed using the PAS staining kit, and the morphology of the cells was observed under a microscope.
HK-2细胞储存糖原的能力可于常规培养（48小时）后直接染色观察
The ability of HK-2 cells to store glycogen can be directly observed through staining after regular cultivation (48 hours).
无论是传统的2D培养还是3D平台培养
Whether in traditional 2D culture or in 3D platform culture...

肾脏通过钠-葡萄糖共转运体(SGLT)在近端小管中重新吸收葡萄糖，这一步主要是通过钠-葡萄糖共转运体完成的，并需要肾小管上皮细胞基侧膜的钠钾ATP酶维持管腔细胞内钠浓度梯度，从而为钠葡萄糖协同转运体提供能量。目前有两个钠葡萄糖共转运子已经被识别，一个是低亲和力高转运能力的钠葡萄糖协同转运子，位于近曲小管S1、S2段，每个转运子携带一分子钠和一分子葡萄糖；另一个在S3段发现为高亲和力低转运能力转运子，转运一分子钠和二分子葡萄糖或半乳糖。

The kidney reabsorbs glucose in the proximal tubule through the sodium-glucose co-transporter (SGLT). This step is mainly mediated by the sodium-glucose co-transporter and requires the sodium-potassium ATPase on the basolateral membrane of renal tubular epithelial cells to maintain the sodium concentration gradient within the luminal cells, providing energy for the sodium-glucose co-transporter. Currently, two sodium-glucose co-transporters have been identified. One is a low-affinity, high-capacity sodium-glucose co-transporter located in the S1 and S2 segments of the proximal tubule, with each transporter carrying one molecule of sodium and one molecule of glucose. The other is a high-affinity, low-capacity transporter discovered in the S3 segment, which transports one molecule of sodium and either two molecules of glucose or one molecule of glucose and one molecule of galactose.
该过程可调控葡萄糖的动态平衡。而钠-葡萄糖共转运蛋白 2 抑制剂(SGLT2)可阻断肾脏对葡萄糖的重吸收。
This process regulates the dynamic balance of glucose. However, sodium-glucose co-transporter 2 inhibitors (SGLT2 inhibitors) can block the reabsorption of glucose by the kidneys.
该过程可调控葡萄糖的动态平衡。而当葡萄糖代谢紊乱到重吸收已经无法正常调控时，就需要某些降糖药如钠-葡萄糖共转运蛋白 2 抑制剂(SGLT2)，阻断肾脏对葡萄糖的重吸收，进行进一步的葡萄糖调控。

This process regulates the dynamic balance of glucose. However, when glucose metabolism is disrupted to the point where reabsorption cannot be properly regulated, certain antidiabetic medications such as sodium-glucose co-transporter 2 inhibitors (SGLT2 inhibitors) are needed to block the reabsorption of glucose by the kidneys, allowing for further regulation of glucose levels.
该过程可调控葡萄糖的动态平衡。而当高血糖发生以致重吸收已经无法正常调控时，就需要某些降糖药如钠-葡萄糖共转运蛋白 2 抑制剂(SGLT2)，阻断肾脏对葡萄糖的重吸收，进行进一步的葡萄糖调控。

This process regulates the dynamic balance of glucose. However, when hyperglycemia occurs to the extent that reabsorption cannot be properly regulated, certain antidiabetic medications such as sodium-glucose co-transporter 2 inhibitors (SGLT2 inhibitors) are needed to block the reabsorption of glucose by the kidneys, enabling further glucose regulation.
肾脏通过钠-葡萄糖共转运体(SGLT)在近端小管中重新吸收葡萄糖，钠-葡萄糖共转运蛋白 2 抑制剂(SGLT2)可阻断肾脏葡萄糖重吸收，进而对高血糖进行控制。

The kidneys reabsorb glucose in the proximal tubules through the sodium-glucose co-transporter (SGLT). Sodium-glucose co-transporter 2 inhibitors (SGLT2 inhibitors) can block the reabsorption of glucose by the kidneys, thereby controlling hyperglycemia.
达格列净和卡格列净分别作用于高血糖细胞模型，以验证该纸基芯片课用于药效学研究
达格列净和卡格列净分别在高血糖细胞模型上进行作用，以验证纸基芯片在药效学研究中的应用性。
